The lowest caste In dwaruen soclety, they were to be found all over Krynn. llulng In filth and squalor In places that had been abandoned by most other llulng creatures, lncludlng anlmals. . . . There were both males and females, though It was not always easy to tell the sexes apart. The femaics lacked whlskers on thelr chhs but had them on thelr cheeks. They wore a tattered ouersklrt wrapped around thelr walsts extendlng to thelr bony knees. Othenulse, they were euery blt as ugly as thelr male counterparts. Desplte thelr wretched appearance, gully dwarues generally led a cheerful exfstence. -Dragons ofAutumn 7blllght
